name: com.likeon.gas
description: Sigil — a GAS-style action-combat & ability framework for Unity. A GameplayTag-driven state bus connects abilities, attributes, effects, input dispatch, melee & ranged combat, movement, and presentation (GameplayCue, camera blend stack, surface effects). Independent Unity implementation; single-player authoritative logic.

samples.description: 可玩功能展示 demo：玩家/敌人 prefab + GASDemo 场景，演示输入→技能→近战/远程命中→扣血→GameplayCue、锁定切换、削韧破防、buff 叠层。属性集+技能由 initialLoadouts 数据驱动。导入后打开 GASDemo 场景按 Play 即玩（WASD 移动 / Shift 冲刺 / 鼠标看 / 空格或左键攻击）。A playable feature-showcase demo shipped as prefabs + scene; attributes & abilities come from data-driven loadouts.
